claim_text: Patient is a triathlete training for a triathlon.
Patient is experiencing right heel pain primarily after activity.
Pain is described as "tight" and "tearing" in the morning.
Right heel tenderness is present with palpation.
Achilles tendon tenderness is present on passive flexion.
Patient will rest training for 1 week.
Patient will take Ibuprofen 3 tablets every 6 hours.
Patient will attend Physical Therapy for 2-3 visits over the next few weeks.
Patient will return in 7-10 days to follow up on physical therapy.
